3337640.name: Dungeon Gang
3337640.description:
Want to be a gambling cut-throat rogue, a righteous monk, or a spellcrafting mage? Dungeon Gang is a multiplayer RPG where you can do this and more with up to 12 players. Includes a custom dungeon creator.

  • Create a character and put together a Dungeon Gang with your friends

  • Explore different character classes - play as a Warrior, Rogue, Monk, Soldier, Ranger, Sorcerer, or Mage

  • Explore the land of Zabasba and face the foes within its dungeons

  • Cast a wide range of spells and design your own spells

  • Read in-game books to increase your skills

  • Experiment with several types of weapons or just use your fists

  • Haggle with merchants & flip coins for gold

  • Puff on pipes and relax with Halflings

  • Create your own custom dungeons with deadly traps, interactive objects, and a wide range of monsters
3337640.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
